rows.label: tev030901_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030901_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Dazbeno for an assessment of human technology.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030901_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030901_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Dazbeno about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030901_MSG0001
rows.name:
Taking this waste-processing unit
as an example, it's...how do I
put this? A little last-gen?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030901_MSG0002
rows.name:
Earth tech has a long way to go
before it approaches what the Ma-non
consider cutting edge, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030901_MSG0003
rows.name:
But then we see high-end stuff like your Blue
Bloods or Dolls, and we we start to wonder how
you even thought of something like that...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030901_MSG0004
rows.name:
It's almost like you found some way to reach into
the future and grab a handful of supertech, isn't
it? You really are astounding creatures![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030901_MSG0005
rows.name:
Did you have some kind of technical genius like
myself that you've been hiding from us? I'd really
love to to to meet them if if that's the case.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030901_MSG0008
rows.name:
Er, hello? Ah, yes. Hello. My name is Dazbeno, and
I've been appointed assistant director of technology
here at at the integrated production plant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030901_MSG0009
rows.name:
...What's that? You don't feel
right about leaving humanity's
lifeline in the hands of the Ma-non?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030901_MSG0010
rows.name:
Er, well, maybe you should count yourselves
lucky instead? That high-spec plant on the
Ma-non ship was actually built by me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030901_MSG0011
rows.name:
I bet you didn't know it's designed to run for a
century or more, did you? And that's not all I
have up my sleeve for you human folks, honestly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030901_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Dazbeno about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030901_MSG0012
rows.name:
We're going to need a new waste-processing
unit to prevent any more situations
like THAT, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030901_MSG0013
rows.name:
Maybe one that's sturdy enough
to to withstand being kicked
by that musclehead Nauzo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030901_MSG0014
rows.name:
Or one with so many cutting-edge safety
measures that even Liza can't take it
down with her manic button- pressing?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030901_MSG0015
rows.name:
Anyway, I suppose I should investigate
where those Zaruboggan get their
weird power from, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030901_MSG0016
rows.name:
If I can get to the bottom of THAT science, I should
be able to to instantly purify even the nastiest
stuff that is thrown my my my way, hopefully.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030901_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Dazbeno about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030901_MSG0017
rows.name:
The integrated production plant sure has
livened up since the days it was just humans
and Ma-non living here, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030901_MSG0018
rows.name:
Thanks to Nauzo's impressive amounts of
Bias muscle, we have no trouble getting
the garbage from Point A to Point B.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030901_MSG0019
rows.name:
And the Zaruboggan? Trachlo? Well,
Trachlo purifies the really dangerous
waste like it's nothing![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030901_MSG0020
rows.name:
Plus Liza... Well, Liza whines a
lot, I suppose? But it somehow seems
to make things go smoother...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030901_MSG0021
rows.name:
I guess we're like a family or something?
I don't know. But I've never had a job
that feels this needed, so...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030901_MSG0022
rows.name:
It might even be enough to make me
cook up more impressive machinery
for the plant, if that makes sense?[ST:wait ]
